title: 批量 case 行级错误第一阶段
goal: 让批量粘贴 eval case 时的无效行清楚显示行号和原因，并在存在无效行时阻止静默跳过后提交。
scope: 扩展批量 case parser，返回有效 drafts 和无效行明细
批量表单有无效行时显示错误摘要并聚焦摘要
把错误回填到批量 case textarea，设置 aria-invalid
保留 tab 或 | 分隔的快速粘贴路径
新增 unit 红绿测试覆盖行级解析
新增 Playwright E2E 覆盖无效行阻止提交和字段错误
out_of_scope: 服务端批量 case 行级错误 JSON Pointer
批量导入预览表格编辑器
批量 case 去重和相似度检测
verification: Red: cd apps/web && npm run test:unit -- components/eval-cases/quick-add-cases-parser.test.ts -> failed as expected because quick-add-cases-parser module was missing
Red: cd apps/web && npm run e2e -- -g "batch case row errors" -> failed as expected because .formErrorSummary did not appear
Green: cd apps/web && npm run test:unit -- components/eval-cases/quick-add-cases-parser.test.ts -> 1 passed
Green: cd apps/web && npm run e2e -- -g "batch case row errors" -> 1 passed
cd apps/api && UV_NO_CACHE=1 uv run pytest -> 98 passed
cd apps/web && npm run test:unit -> 5 files / 16 tests passed
cd apps/web && npm run typecheck -> passed
cd apps/web && npm run build -> passed
cd apps/web && npm audit --omit=dev -> found 0 vulnerabilities after one registry socket hang up retry
cd apps/web && npm run e2e -> 66 passed
